subcodes.first_line: Your letter was renowned and brought spiritual joy. God willing, through that eloquent tongue [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات نامی بود و مورث فرح روحانی گشت انشاء الله در آن لسان ترجمان فصیح
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings
